name: Patriotic Jello Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to the package directions. Remove from pans and allow to cool.
2. Clean the baking pans.
3. Return the cooled cake to the pans.
4. Prick the cake surface with a meat fork, spacing the holes about half an inch apart.
5. Mix the strawberry gelatin powder with 1 cup of boiling water until dissolved. Pour over one layer of the cake.
6. Repeat step 5 with the blueberry gelatin powder for the second layer of the cake.
7. Refrigerate the cake for 3-4 hours, or until set.
8. To remove the cake from the pans, dip the bottoms of the pans in hot water to loosen the cake, then carefully turn the pans upside down.
